note: Phase 0 (PRD Section 7.1): the harness must run and report accuracy against the corpus before any rule module exists; there is no accuracy gate yet, so the floor is 0. Raise this as each phase lands (Phase 1 case slice -> 0.995, ...). The v1 release gate is 0.995 over >=1200 entries (PRD Sections 7.1, 7.2).
